title: SHINE 53
overview: WWN & SHINE Wrestling present  SHINE 53,  Queens, NY,  9/8/2018. Matches include:  SHINE Championship Tournament – First Round Matches  • SHINE Nova Champion Candy Cartwright vs. Ivelisse  • Mercedes Martinez vs. Stormie Lee  • Santana vs. Priscilla Kelly  • Brandi Lauren vs. Allysin Kay.  SHINE Tag Team Championship Match  Twisted Sisterz of Holidead & Thunder Rosa defend vs. The Cutie Pie Club of Kiera Hogan & Dementia D’Rose.  Plus the Semi-Finals & Finals of the SHINE Championship Tournament!
